etymology.description: Recorded as a variant form of 節(節)
etymology.interpretation: 卪 does not have a distinct etymology on its own but is instead a recorded variant of 節(節) (jié, "node; joint"), which combines semantic ⺮(⺮) (zhú, "bamboo") + phonetic 即(即) (jí, "immediate"), representing a bamboo joint and its meanings related to nodes or segments.
